core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Bloomberg Terminal density with Sci-Fi HUD aesthetics.
Emotion First: Evoke 'Precision' and 'Authority'. The user is a commander of capital.
Content is King: Data density is the feature. Every pixel must communicate value.
Negative Space: Use it structurally to separate dense data clusters, not for 'airiness'.
Contrast: High contrast for data legibility (Neon on Dark). Low contrast for structural containers.
anti_patterns: No generic 'Inter' everywhere. Use distinctive fonts.
No purple/teal gradients for CTAs. Use sharp, functional colors.
No centered layouts. Asymmetry creates tension and guides the eye.
No rounded corners > 8px. This is a precision tool, not a toy.

rules: Never use pure black (#000000). Use #0b0e14 for depth.
Data colors (Green/Red) must be neon/bright to pop against the dark background.
Borders should be subtle (#2a2f3a) unless active/focused.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-sm shadow-none font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-xs px-6 py-2
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-border text-foreground hover:bg-accent hover:text-white rounded-sm
buttons.destructive: bg-red-900/20 text-red-500 border border-red-900/50 hover:bg-red-900/40 rounded-sm

inputs.default: bg-[#0b0e14] border-border focus:border-primary rounded-sm font-mono text-sm h-9

cards.metric: p-4 flex flex-col justify-between h-32 border-l-4 border-l-primary bg-[#151921]

charts.style: Minimalist. Remove grid lines or make them extremely subtle (#2a2f3a). Use tooltip with backdrop-blur.

tables.style: Dense. Row height 32px. Header uppercase text-xs text-muted-foreground. Font-mono for all cell data.

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay (opacity 0.02) on the main background to reduce digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid borders with 10% opacity. Use 'tracing beam' effect for active cards.
visual_enhancers.motion: Micro-interactions only. 0.1s ease-out for hover. No long transitions.

images.logo_placeholder: Use text 'ForgeQuant-Lab' in Chivo font, bold, tracking-tighter.

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. SETUP TAILWIND: Update `tailwind.config.js` to extend the font family and colors as defined in this JSON.
3. GLOBAL CSS: Update `index.css` to set the base background color to #0b0e14 and apply the noise texture if possible.
4. COMPONENT OVERRIDES: When using Shadcn components, override the 'rounded-md' class to 'rounded-sm' or 'rounded-none' to match the sharp terminal aesthetic.
5. CHARTS: Ensure Recharts are responsive. Use `ResponsiveContainer`. Customize the `Tooltip` to use a dark glassmorphism style.
6. DATA-TESTID: Add `data-testid` to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, grid items).
7. LAYOUT: Use `grid-cols-12` for the main dashboard. Sidebar should be `col-span-2` or `col-span-1` (collapsible icon rail). Main content `col-span-10` or `col-span-11`.
8. ERROR HANDLING: If a chart has no data, show a 'No Data' state with a technical icon (e.g., `Activity` from lucide-react) and a helpful message.
9. FRANKENSTEIN MONITOR: Use the 'Abstract Glitch' image as a subtle background or header for this specific page to reinforce the 'unstable' theme.
universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed.
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...).
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...}).
Use sonner for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx.
